steps.title: Spot the comparison structure
steps.content: The key signal is the comparison: “features that are [blank] for running restrict speeds more than the features needed for flying.” The passage explains why speeds differ by contrasting how each set of features restricts speed.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content:
Essential (necessary/required) parallels “needed” to explain why running's structural requirements restrict speed more than flying's do.

The other options either lack necessity's meaning (trivial, approved) or don't address speed restrictions (challenging).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
